sanskrit:
इति ते ज्ञानमाख्यातं गुह्याद्गुह्यतरं मया।
विमृश्यैतदशेषेण यथेच्छसि तथा कुरु॥
transliteration:
iti te jñānam ākhyātaṃ guhyād guhyataraṃ mayā |
vimṛśyaitad aśeṣeṇa yathechasi tathā kuru ||
literal_meaning: Thus to you knowledge has been declared, more secret than the secret, by Me; having fully deliberated on this, as you desire, so act.
contextual_meaning: After offering the deepest possible insight, Kṛṣṇa withdraws all coercion and returns full authorship of action to Arjuna, inviting mature self-reflection before choice.
psychological_state: The moment after insight when the therapist stops directing and the client must own the next step; empowerment through relinquishment of authority.
trigger_scenario: Your mentor has laid out every pro and con for a life-altering decision, then says, 'Sleep on it—whatever you choose, I’ll stand by you.'
anchor_text: Reflect deeply, then choose your path with full ownership.
